import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import "../../styles/storekeeper/storekeeper-dashboard.css"; import api from "../../services/api"; const StorekeeperDashboard = () => { const [dashboard, setDashboard] = useState(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [error, setError] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { fetchDashboardData(); }, []); const fetchDashboardData = async () => { try { setLoading(true); const [balanceRes, summaryRes, lowStockRes, recentImportsRes, recentExportsRes] = await Promise.all([ api.get("/inventory/balance"), api.get("/inventory/summary"), api.get("/inventory/alerts/low-stock"), api.get("/inventory/imports"), api.get("/inventory/exports"), ]); // Combine and sort recent transactions const recentImports = (recentImportsRes.data || []).map(i => ({...i, type: "IMPORT", date: i.import_date})); const recentExports = (recentExportsRes.data || []).map(e => ({...e, type: "EXPORT", date: e.export_date})); const transactions = [...recentImports, ...recentExports] .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date) - new Date(a.date)) .slice(0, 10); setDashboard({ balance: balanceRes.data || [], summary: summaryRes.data || {}, lowStock: lowStockRes.data || [], transactions: transactions }); setError(null); } catch (err) { console.error("L?i khi t?i d? li?u:", err); setError("Kh�ng th? t?i d? li?u dashboard. Vui l�ng th? l?i."); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; if (loading) return
